rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ERNEST V RHINE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Objector Lydia Marquez Rhines Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Re Demurrer Of Kimberly Rhine Gagosian To First Amended Will Contest Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Larry Larson Esq.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Lydia Marquez Rhine's ("Lydia") Motion for Sanctions is DENIED. Respondent Kimberly Rhine Gagosian is not barred from relitigating the standing issue in the latest round of demurrer, and her challenge to the sufficiency of the "undue benefit" allegations contained in Lydia's FAWC is not so clearly frivolous or filed "primarily for an improper purpose, such as to harass or to cause unnecessary delay or needless increase in the cost of litigation" to justify awarding sanctions pursuant to CCP § 128.7.
